name: Support Vector Machine (SVM)
description: A support vector machine classifies by finding the maximum-margin hyperplane: data is mapped into a feature space, and if not linearly separable a kernel implicitly lifts it higher; solving the dual quadratic program identifies the support vectors that define the boundary, with a soft margin allowing controlled violations.
